nodes.author: Lossfunk

nodes.label: Codex Feedback Integration
nodes.rationale: The agent is instructed to take Codex feedback (if available) at each critical step â€” including when rating research questions and before the first draft. Codex must also read the research philosophy document. Feedback always resolves confusion and improves outcomes.

nodes.label: AI Conference Reviewer Self-Check
nodes.rationale: Before writing the first draft, the agent must act as an AI conference reviewer to ensure research passes minimum bar (workshop level baseline, main conference or journal level as bonus). Prevents investing in write-up before validating research quality.

nodes.label: Submittable Paper Output (LaTeX + PDF)
nodes.rationale: Final expected outcome is a folder containing a submittable paper in LaTeX (.tex) and compiled PDF. Draft must have no AI style, minimal em dashes, and must include acknowledgements that the paper was assisted by Claude (for experiments and writing).

nodes.label: System Resource Discovery
nodes.rationale: Agent must figure out available CPU, GPU, and memory before proposing experiments, so that experiments can actually be run on the available system. Directly operationalizes the Feasibility criterion from research-philosophy.md.
